PREDICATES:
in_club(x) ::: x is in the club
perform_talent_show(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows often
attend_school_events(x) ::: x attends and is very engaged with school events
inactive_disinterested(x) ::: x is inactive and disinterested
chaperone_dance(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
student(x) ::: x is a student who attends the school
young_child_teenager(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager
wish_further_education(x) ::: x wishes to further their academic careers and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
in_club(bonnie)
(perform_talent_show(bonnie) | -perform_talent_show(bonnie) & -attend_school_events(bonnie) & -student(bonnie))
all x (in_club(x) -> (perform_talent_show(x) | inactive_disinterested(x)))
all x (in_club(x) -> (inactive_disinterested(x) -> chaperone_dance(x)))
all x (in_club(x) & young_child_teenager(x) & wish_further_education(x) -> student(x))

CONCLUSION:
perform_talent_show(bonnie)

PREDICATES:
in_club(x) ::: x is in the club
perform_talent_show(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows often
attend_school_events(x) ::: x attends and is very engaged with school events
inactive_disinterested(x) ::: x is an inactive and disinterested member of their community
chaperone_dance(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
student_attends_school(x) ::: x is a student who attends the school
young_child_or_teenager(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager
wish_further_education(x) ::: x wishes to further her academic career and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
in_club(bonnie)
(perform_talent_show(x) | inactive_disinterested(x)) | in_club(x)
-student_attends_school(x) | chaperone_dance(x)
all x (inactive_disinterested(x) -> chaperone_dance(x))
all x (young_child_or_teenager(x) & wish_further_education(x) -> student_attends_school(x))
(attend_school_events(bonnie) & student_attends_school(bonnie)) | -(attend_school_events(bonnie) & student_attends_school(bonnie))

CONCLUSION:
(young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & wish_further_education(bonnie) & chaperone_dance(bonnie)) | -(young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & wish_further_education(bonnie)) -> (student_attends_school(bonnie) | inactive_disinterested(bonnie))

PREDICATES:
in_club(x) ::: x is in the club
perform_talent_show(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows often
attend_school_events(x) ::: x attends and is very engaged with school events
chaperone_dance(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
student(x) ::: x is a student who attends the school
inactive_community_member(x) ::: x is an inactive and disinterested member of their community
young_child_or_teenager(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager
wish_to_further_academic_career(x) ::: x wishes to further her academic career and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
in_club(bonnie)
(perform_talent_show(bonnie) | attend_school_events(bonnie)) -> (young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & inactive_community_member(bonnie))
all x (in_club(x) -> (perform_talent_show(x) | inactive_community_member(x)))
all x (in_club(x) -> (chaperone_dance(x) -> -student(x)))
all x (inactive_community_member(x) -> chaperone_dance(x))
all x (young_child_or_teenager(x) & wish_to_further_academic_career(x) -> student(x))

CONCLUSION:
(chaperone_dance(bonnie) | perform_talent_show(bonnie)) -> (young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & inactive_community_member(bonnie))

all x (have_lunch_at_home(x) -> work_remotely_from_home(x))
all x (employee(x) & in_other_countries(x) -> work_remotely_from_home(x))
-manager(x) -> -work_remotely_from_home(x)
all x (manager(x) <-> (go_to_company_building(x)))
CONCLUSION:
have_lunch_in_company_building(james)
